title: The Campaign of Kharistan
description: Asad then went on until he stopped at al-Sidrah, a village by Balkh. In charge of the cavalry of the Ahl al-'Aliyah was Rayhan b. Ziyad al-'Amiri al-'Abdalli of the Banu 'Abdallih b. Kab. Asad removed him, putting Mansur b. Silim512 in charge of the Ahi al-'Aliyah. Then he left al-Sidrah, encamping at Kharistan. Asad heard the neighing of a horse and asked, "Whose is this?" He was told, "It belongs to al-'Aggar b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
